findings: Features e23 to e32 exhibit extremely low cardinality with near-constant values, preventing meaningful dependency concentration analysis.
Dependency contextualization attempts failed due to absence of finite pairwise dependencies, confirming lack of tight clustering with class labels.
Correlation between closely related low cardinality features is undefined, preserving local tension between low cardinality and class variation.
contradictions: Tension between near-constant low cardinality features and other features showing class-conditioned structural variation remains unresolved.
limitations: Dependency concentration analysis is limited by the near-constant values and undefined correlations in the local feature set.
